description: Real-time demand sensing for perishable dairy (milk, laban, yogurt, cheese, juice). Ingests hourly POS + Ramadan calendar + current on-hand; flags POS divergence, real-time shortage in the next 6 hours, and event-driven pre-position gaps; recommends re-forecast, intra-day transfer, or cold-chain pre-position.
tooltip_text: Focus: real-time POS divergence, Ramadan ramp detection, short-horizon shortage + pre-position for dairy.

show.label: Laban POS vs forecast
show.text: What's today's hourly POS vs forecast for LABAN-500ML at STORE-EAST?

show.label: Milk next 6h
show.text: Show current on-hand vs next 6 hours of predicted POS for MILK-FULL-1L network-wide.

solve.text: Trigger an emergency transfer plan for SKUs breaching on-hand today.

simulate.text: If Ramadan demand lands 20% above current forecast, where do we break first?

simulate.text: If MILK-FULL-1L velocity doubles for the next 4 hours at STORE-EAST, what's my on-hand trajectory?
